description:
Offered: every Spring
Photography Portfolio Development allows upper-level students to develop a highly focused and organized portfolio suitable for professional and artistic domains. In addition, the course looks at promotional strategies for a photography career, engaging students in developing components ranging from business plans, niche brand identity, logos, and websites to collateral and professional resumes specific to a professional career in Photography.
Prerequisite(s): COMM 3620 (may be taken concurrently) or permission of instructor.
prerequisites: COMM 3620 (may be taken concurrently) or permission of instructor.
